title: Sudden Rainstorm 暴雨避雨
scene: Zoe和Kate在外面玩时突然下起暴雨，赶紧找地方避雨。

lines.en: Kate, look at those dark clouds!
Oh no, it is starting to rain! We need to find shelter!
lines.zh: 噢不，开始下雨了！我们得找地方避雨！

lines.en: Quick, run to that bus stop over there!
I am so wet already! The rain is really heavy!
We made it. Are you OK, Kate?
I am fine, but I am freezing. I wish I had a jacket.
lines.zh: 我没事，但我好冷。我真希望带了外套。

lines.en: I have an umbrella in my bag. Let me share it.
lines.zh: 我包里有把伞。我们共用吧。

lines.en: Thanks! Should we call someone to pick us up?
lines.zh: 谢谢！我们要打电话叫人来接我们吗？

lines.en: Good idea. Let me call my mom.
lines.zh: 好主意。我给我妈妈打电话。

lines.en: Next time we should check the weather before going out!
lines.zh: 下次出门前我们应该看看天气预报！
